title: Doff Rhododendrons, Azaleas, Camellias & Magnolias Controlled Release Plant Food– 1Kg Fast-Acting Controlled Release Garden Fertiliser Granules – Encourages Root Development – Feeds for 3 Months
features: VERSATILE PLANT FOOD – Boost the health of ericaceous plants and shrubs with Doff Rhododendrons, Azaleas, Camellias & Magnolias Controlled Release Plant Food. Enriched with NPK 11-5-9, and nutrients, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants both outdoors and indoors

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this flower food strengthens roots, promotes fuller blooms, and improves overall plant health. Sprinkle 25-30g of the controlled-release garden fertiliser granules onto beds and borders and lightly fork in, feeding every 3 months

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This plant ferteliser is supplied in a convenient easy-to-use shaker dispensing bottle for quick and efficient application. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive garden plants, Doff’s plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality flower feed provides consistent controlled-release nutrition for thriving, blooming plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor flowering plants, a 1kg bottle provides 3 months of nutrient-rich feed to support healthy growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
